implementation_validation: At v0.5.208, regression is 551/551, NP is 43/43, and 1,235 construction assertions pass. CopularANotAQuestion has two source-linked positives, one source-linked terminal-tag boundary, and one zero-weight implementation probe.
linguistic_confidence: CopularANotAQuestion remains unsupported_generalization. The release reconciles a narrow overt full-form predicate/clause profile and tag boundary, but nominal/possessive support, contracted-form ontology, complement coverage, and role-neutral panel evidence remain incomplete.
overclaim_review_scope: Re-read the CopularANotAQuestion fallback, slot metadata, public note, checked Law/Li/Wong/Yip source records, standardized tests, and the separate PolarQuestionFrame path. The release does not claim that every 係唔係 complement is licensed, that 係咪 is merged, or that a terminal tag is a copular A-not-A complement construction.
unresolved_release_questions: The remaining 56 implementation-only labels still require source/runtime reconciliation.
CopularANotAQuestion still requires direct nominal/possessive evidence, contracted 係咪 ontology review, broader complement boundaries, and role-neutral panel evidence.
The full retirement-review window opened at handoff sequence 31 and must be completed no later than sequence 41.
RUL and PFV survey integration remains paused pending clean locked-instrument evidence.
